data.body: S4 (c9d8) plan-review PASSED first try + CLAIMED. TDD RED confirmed: happy (config parse/defaults, active-token->AccessToken w/ Basic auth via httpx.MockTransport) + held-out (no-exp->None-expiry, active:false->None, missing-aud reject/opt-in, mismatched-aud, aud-array membership, scope-split, non-200/timeout/malformed/no-active -> IntrospectionError raise, no-caching x2 calls, http/private SSRF, secret-env absent/empty refuse, composite component, manifest). Dispatching implementer.
